title: Full-Stack Web Development
metaTitle: Full-Stack Web Development in Miami, FL | Avaab Razzaq
metaDescription: Build high-performance web applications in Miami, FL with modern full-stack architecture, strong SEO foundations, and fast delivery. Book a discovery call.
heroSubtitle: Modern, blazing-fast web applications built with the latest frameworks and best practices.
introduction: Slow websites lose customers. I build high-performance web applications that load instantly, convert visitors, and scale effortlessly. From landing pages to complex SaaS platforms, I deliver production-ready code that works.

benefits.title: Lightning-Fast Performance
benefits.description: Sub-second load times with modern frameworks like Astro that ship minimal JavaScript to the browser.

benefits.title: SEO-First Architecture
benefits.description: Built-in technical SEO from day one—proper meta tags, semantic HTML, structured data, and Core Web Vitals optimization.

benefits.title: Scalable & Maintainable
benefits.description: Clean code architecture with TypeScript, comprehensive testing, and documentation that grows with your business.

services.name: Custom Web Applications
services.description: Full-stack applications with modern frontends (React, SolidJS, Astro) and robust backends (Node.js, PostgreSQL).

services.name: Landing Pages & Marketing Sites
services.description: High-converting marketing websites optimized for speed, SEO, and lead generation.

services.name: E-commerce Solutions
services.description: Custom e-commerce experiences with payment integration, inventory management, and conversion optimization.

services.name: API Development
services.description: RESTful and GraphQL APIs designed for performance, security, and developer experience.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Web Application?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project requirements and create something exceptional together.

faqs.question: What technologies do you use for web development?
faqs.answer: I specialize in modern, high-performance stacks: Astro and Next.js for frontend/SSG, React and SolidJS for interactive components, TypeScript everywhere, Node.js and PostgreSQL for backend, TailwindCSS for styling. I choose technologies based on your specific needs—not dogma.

faqs.question: How long does web development take?
faqs.answer: Timeline depends on scope. Landing pages: 1-2 weeks. Marketing sites: 2-4 weeks. Custom web applications: 4-12 weeks. SaaS MVPs: 4-8 weeks. I provide detailed estimates after understanding your requirements and always define clear milestones.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. I offer maintenance retainers covering security updates, performance monitoring, bug fixes, and feature additions. I also provide thorough documentation and handoff so your team can maintain the project independently if preferred.

faqs.question: Why is website performance important?
faqs.answer: Performance directly impacts business outcomes. Every 100ms of latency costs 1% in conversions. Google uses Core Web Vitals as a ranking factor. Mobile users abandon sites that take longer than 3 seconds to load. Fast sites rank better, convert better, and provide better user experience.
